scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development concurrently "vite frontend --config frontend/vite.config.ts -- --mode local" "tsx watch backend/index.ts local" "tsx watch backend/target.ts local"
scripts.dev:remote: NODE_ENV=development concurrently "vite frontend --config frontend/vite.config.ts -- --mode remote" "tsx watch backend/index.ts remote" "tsx watch backend/target.ts remote"
scripts.setup: tsx scripts/trust.ts local && tsx scripts/certs.ts local
scripts.setup:remote: tsx scripts/trust.ts local && tsx scripts/certs.ts remote && tsx scripts/trust.ts deck remote
